title: TypeError: HTTPConnection.request() got an unexpected keyword argument 'chunked'
body:
I have a fedora coreos virtual guest running two containers.
the previous coreos version, whatever the latest 37 version was.
since the coreos v37 version was upgrade to 38.20230414.3.0, all seems ok.
now coreos version is 38.20230430.3.1 and the podman version has caught up, 4.5.0.

now that podman-py and podman are at the same version when i execute:
$ podman system service --time=120 'unix:///var/home/core/.local/run/podman/podman.sock'
$ python
>>> from podman import PodmanClient
>>> uri = 'unix:///var/home/core/.local/run/podman/podman.sock'
>>> with PodmanClient(base_url=uri) as podman_client:
...          podman_client.containers.list()
...
i get:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<stdin>", line 2, in <module>
  File "/var/home/core/micromamba/envs/podmanpy-py3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/domain/containers_manager.py", line 87, in list
    response = self.client.get("/containers/json", params=params)
               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/var/home/core/micromamba/envs/podmanpy-py3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/client.py", line 236, in get
    return self._request(
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/var/home/core/micromamba/envs/podmanpy-py3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/podman/api/client.py", line 404, in _request
    self.request(
  File "/var/home/core/micromamba/envs/podmanpy-py3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py", line 587, in request
    resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/var/home/core/micromamba/envs/podmanpy-py3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py", line 701, in send
    r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs)
        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/var/home/core/micromamba/envs/podmanpy-py3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py", line 486, in send
    resp = conn.urlopen(
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/var/home/core/micromamba/envs/podmanpy-py3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py", line 790, in urlopen
    response = self._make_request(
               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/var/home/core/micromamba/envs/podmanpy-py3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py", line 496, in _make_request
    conn.request(
TypeError: HTTPConnection.request() got an unexpected keyword argument 'chunked'
>>>

have i missed something?
it was all working fine while the coreos podman version and the podman-py version were not synchronised. that is, the coreos podman version was lower than the podman-py version.

regards,
john natschev.

comments.body: i am closing this issue because i found it is a duplicate of #267
